query:
-- Find UCXcel services in sasboss_services with enterprise info
SELECT 
  ss.service_id, ss.enterprise_id, ss.enterprise_name, ss.service_ref_id,
  ss.product_name, ss.monthly_recurring, ss.service_status, ss.service_number, ss.contact_name
FROM sasboss_services ss
WHERE ss.product_name LIKE '%UCXcel%'
ORDER BY ss.enterprise_name
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Find UCXcel services in sasboss_services with enterprise info
SELECT 
  ss.service_id, ss.enterprise_id, ss.enterprise_name, ss.service_ref_id,
  ss.product_name, ss.monthly_recurring, ss.service_status, ss.service_number, ss.contact_name
FROM sasboss_services ss
WHERE ss.product_name LIKE '%UCXcel%'
ORDER BY ss.enterprise_name
LIMIT 20;
